superroo-brain.description: SuperRoo Central Brain MCP — project memory, bugs, features, Codex tasks, Kimi tasks, commit/deploy log

deepseek-coder.description: DeepSeek V4 Coder MCP — delegate coding, review, refactor, and explain tasks to DeepSeek V4. Follows SuperRoo workflow: Claude plans/reviews → DeepSeek codes → DeepSeek summarizes (context compression via build-agent-context.mjs, lesson summaries via ollama-summarize-lesson.mjs). Ollama handles embeddings only.

ollama.description: VPS Ollama MCP — generate embeddings (nomic-embed-text), chat with local models (qwen2.5:0.5b). Note: Summarization is now handled by DeepSeek API, not Ollama. Connects to VPS Ollama at 100.64.175.88:11434 via Tailscale
